summary: Ukrainian forces struck a school boxing hall in Enerhodar and a refinery in Saratov, while Russian Shahed drones were reported near Aviatorske, Kherson and Rivne. Ukraine received an IRIS‑T air‑defence launcher as Russia threatened Iskander‑M missile launches from Bryansk. Drone activity remains high across multiple fronts, with dozens of Shahed interceptions reported.
key_points: Ukrainian strike damaged a boxing school in Enerhodar (Source: @tass_agency/378330).
Russian Shahed drone flew past Aviatorske in Dnipro region (Source: @mon1tor_ua/67304).
Ukraine reported 10 Shahed drones near Kherson moving toward Dnipropetrovsk (Source: @mon1tor_ua/67312).
Two Shahed drones observed over Rivne (Source: @mon1tor_ua/67303).
High threat of Iskander‑M ballistic missiles from Bryansk region (Source: @mon1tor_ua/67305).
Ukraine received an IRIS‑T air‑defence launcher; Russia launched over 2,300 drones, 1,560 guided bombs and 108 missiles in a week (Source: @UkraineNow/81568).
Saratov oil refinery suffered fire after aerial attack (Source: @UkraineNow/81577).

sections.executive_summary: Ukrainian forces struck a boxing school in Enerhodar and a major oil refinery in Saratov, while Russian Shahed drones were reported near Aviatorske, Kherson and Rivne. Ukraine bolstered its air defence with an IRIS‑T launcher as Russia warned of Iskander‑M missile launches from Bryansk. Drone activity remains intense across multiple fronts, with dozens of Shahed interceptions reported.

points: Ukrainian forces hit a boxing school in Enerhodar, damaging building windows and a bus, according to the mayor (Source: @tass_agency/378330).
Ukraine received an IRIS‑T surface‑to‑air missile system, enhancing its air‑defence capability (Source: @UkraineNow/81568).
Ukrainian drones struck the machine block building of the Zaporozhye Nuclear Power Plant, causing a through explosion but no radiation increase (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30558).
Third Army Corps claimed control over logistics routes in Luhansk and Eastern Slobozhanshchyna, striking enemy armour and ammunition depots deep behind lines (Source: @UkraineNow/81575).
Ukrainian intelligence warned of possible mass attacks and urged vigilance to air‑raid alerts (Source: @UkraineNow/81557).
Ukrainian officials reported Russia launched over 2,300 drones, 1,560 guided bombs and 108 missiles in the past week (Source: @UkraineNow/81568).
Ukrainian forces reported a fuel tanker attacked by a drone in Sal'kovo, Kherson, preventing fuel delivery to Crimea (Source: @eRadarrua/94476).
Russian authorities warned of a high threat of Iskander‑M ballistic missile launches from Bryansk oblast (Source: @mon1tor_ua/67305).
Russia claimed to have tested a low‑cost anti‑drone system (MADIS) using JLTV platforms with 30‑mm guns and Stinger missiles (Source: @tass_agency/378317).
Russian tactical aviation activity was noted on the north‑east direction, raising threat of air strikes near front‑line areas (Source: @kpszsu/63376).
Russia reported a fatal motor‑boat accident in Irkutsk region, unrelated to combat (Source: @tass_agency/378299).
Russian officials dismissed Ukrainian claims about gas transit through Armenia as false (Source: @tass_agency/378325).
Russia announced participation of German entrepreneurs in the upcoming St. Petersburg International Economic Forum (Source: @tass_agency/378322).
Russian space agency reported cosmonauts completing an EVA to install solar‑flare equipment (Source: @tass_agency/378301).
Shahed drone passed near Aviatorske in Dnipro region, indicating continued aerial threat from the east (Source: @mon1tor_ua/67304).
Ukrainian drone groups reported operating over Kherson heading toward Kryvyi Rih and over Odesa heading toward Tatarbunary (Source: @kpszsu/63404).
Ukrainian forces reported a drone strike on a fuel tanker in Sal'kovo, Kherson, disrupting fuel flow to Crimea (Source: @eRadarrua/94476).
Multiple Ukrainian UAV groups were observed moving from Dnipro eastward toward northern directions (Source: @kpszsu/63380).
Ukrainian intelligence noted possible mass attacks in the east, urging heightened alertness (Source: @UkraineNow/81557).
Russian ballistic missile threat from Bryansk could affect eastern Ukrainian territories (Source: @mon1tor_ua/67305).
Ukrainian Third Army Corps claimed strikes on logistics nodes deep within occupied Luhansk, an eastern region (Source: @UkraineNow/81575).
Two Shahed drones were reported over Rivne, indicating northern incursions (Source: @mon1tor_ua/67303).
Multiple Shahed drones observed near Kherson heading toward Dnipropetrovsk, with some passing through northern oblasts (Source: @mon1tor_ua/67312).
Ukrainian UAV activity reported across Chernihiv, Sumy, and Kharkiv borders, with several groups moving westward (Source: @kpszsu/63406).
Reactive UAVs were seen along the Belarus border in northern Chernihiv, heading west (Source: @kpszsu/63401).
Ukrainian UAVs reported over Zhytomyr heading toward Ivano-Frankivsk and Kyiv directions (Source: @kpszsu/63357).
Russian ballistic missile threat could also impact northern Ukrainian regions (Source: @mon1tor_ua/67305).
Ukrainian forces noted UAV reconnaissance near Horodnia in Chernihiv (Source: @eRadarrua/94422).
Saratov oil refinery in Russia was attacked, causing fire and damage to primary processing unit ELOU‑AVT‑6 (Source: @UkraineNow/81577).
Ukrainian drone strike hit the machine block of the Zaporozhye Nuclear Power Plant, causing structural damage (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30558).
Ukrainian UAV groups operated over Kherson heading toward Kryvyi Rih and over Odesa toward Tatarbunary (Source: @kpszsu/63404).
A fuel tanker in Sal'kovo, Kherson, was hit by a drone, preventing fuel delivery to Crimea (Source: @eRadarrua/94476).
Russian tactical aviation activity noted on north‑east axis, potentially affecting southern front operations (Source: @kpszsu/63376).
Ukrainian forces reported drone activity near the southern border of occupied Kherson (Source: @eRadarrua/94481).
Russian missile threat from Bryansk could be launched toward southern Ukrainian territories (Source: @mon1tor_ua/67305).

Multiple Shahed drones reported across Ukraine: 1 near Aviatorske, 10 near Kherson, 2 over Rivne, and 2 over Dnipro from the north (Sources: @mon1tor_ua/67304, @mon1tor_ua/67312, @mon1tor_ua/67303, @mon1tor_ua/67314).
Ukraine reported over 2,300 drones, 1,560 guided bombs and 108 missiles launched by Russia in a single week (Source: @UkraineNow/81568).
Russia warned of possible Iskander‑M ballistic missile launches from Bryansk, raising high‑altitude threat (Source: @mon1tor_ua/67305).
U.S. tested a low‑cost anti‑drone system (MADIS) using JLTVs with 30‑mm guns and Stinger missiles (Source: @tass_agency/378317).
Ukrainian UAV groups were active over multiple fronts, including Chernihiv, Sumy, Kharkiv, and Zhytomyr (Sources: @kpszsu/63404, @kpszsu/63357).
Russian tactical aviation activity noted on north‑east direction, indicating possible air strikes (Source: @kpszsu/63376).
Ukrainian forces employed drones to strike strategic infrastructure such as the Zaporozhye NPP and a fuel tanker in Kherson (Sources: @ukr_leaks_eng/30558, @eRadarrua/94476).

key_developments: Ukrainian forces damaged a boxing school in Enerhodar, breaking windows and a bus (Source: @tass_agency/378330).
A Shahed drone passed near Aviatorske in Dnipro region, indicating ongoing aerial threats (Source: @mon1tor_ua/67304).
Ten Shahed drones were observed near Kherson moving toward Dnipropetrovsk (Source: @mon1tor_ua/67312).
Two Shahed drones were reported over Rivne, highlighting northern incursions (Source: @mon1tor_ua/67303).
Russia warned of a high threat of Iskander‑M ballistic missile launches from Bryansk oblast (Source: @mon1tor_ua/67305).
Ukraine received an IRIS‑T air‑defence launcher as Russia launched over 2,300 drones, 1,560 guided bombs and 108 missiles in a week (Source: @UkraineNow/81568).
Saratov oil refinery in Russia suffered fire after aerial attack, damaging its primary processing unit (Source: @UkraineNow/81577).
sections.threat_assessment: Russian aerial activity remains intense, with Shahed drones operating across multiple fronts and a credible Iskander‑M ballistic missile threat from Bryansk. Ukraine's acquisition of IRIS‑T improves its air‑defence but Russian drone and missile volumes are high, stressing Ukrainian systems. Ukrainian drone strikes on strategic Russian infrastructure, such as the Saratov refinery and Zaporozhye NPP, demonstrate growing offensive capability but also risk escalation.
sections.regional_response: Western partners are monitoring the increased Russian missile threat and have expressed support for Ukraine's air‑defence upgrades. EU officials warned of collective response to attacks on neighboring states, while the U.S. is studying Ukrainian drone tactics and testing low‑cost anti‑drone solutions. Russia continues diplomatic narratives about gas transit and economic ties despite military actions.
sections.intelligence_notes: Ukrainian UAV deployments show coordinated multi‑directional operations, targeting logistics, energy, and nuclear facilities. Russian Shahed activity clusters near key transport corridors, suggesting attempts to disrupt supply lines. The Iskander‑M warning indicates possible escalation to higher‑range ballistic strikes, requiring heightened alert across all front‑line air‑defence units.
